Meet
Gandhi

Data Analytics & Insight Leader

Eight years turning business questions into analytical systems that drive decisions, with deep work across financial services, risk, and enterprise performance. Every engagement starts the same way: what does leadership need to see, and what will they do differently once they see it? From there the rest follows. The KPI design, the data pipelines, the storytelling layer, the adoption plan. Across 35 organizations, the through line holds. Insight built to move a decision, not to report activity.

Core Capability

Analytics Built for Decisions, Not Reports

🎯

KPI Architecture and Performance Frameworks

KPIs are not metrics. A KPI is a question with a threshold — something that tells a leader whether to act. Design starts with business strategy, works backwards through what needs to be measured, and defines ownership, cadence, and data source before a single visual is built. The result is a reporting infrastructure that organizations actually use.

KPI DesignKRI Frameworks Benchmarking & Trend AnalysisPerformance Governance
📊

Storytelling Dashboards and Executive Reporting

A dashboard that shows everything tells nothing. The craft is in what gets removed — guiding the eye from a number to a question to a root cause to an action. Executive dashboards are designed to run a meeting, not decorate a screen. The structure drives the conversation toward a decision, every time it opens.

Power BIDAX Qlik SenseExecutive Reporting
⚙️

Automated Pipelines and Descriptive Analysis

Most reporting effort is spent assembling data, not reading it. The fix is automated pipelines that pull from multiple source systems, run quality checks at the point of ingestion, and feed descriptive analysis of the questions that actually matter: retention, churn, claim patterns, and where the next opportunity sits. The same foundation extends into text and sentiment analysis, classifying document data by theme and favorability.

Power AutomateAzure Data Lake / SQL Data Quality ControlsText & Sentiment Analysis
Work Samples

From Data to Decision

A selection of dashboards from real client engagements across finance, risk, and performance, recreated with anonymized data. Each was built to answer a specific executive question, not to display data, but to drive a conversation and enable a call to action.

Finance · Government Transit
Finance · Metrolinx

Strategic P&L Summary Dashboard

5,000+ Annual Hours Recovered

Built for a senior finance leadership team managing a $2.4B+ annual operating budget. Gives executives a real-time read on YTD revenue performance, operating requirement variance, expense breakdown by type, and forecast deviation — all in a single view with drill-down capability.

Design IntentReplaced 70+ Excel files and 200+ monthly email submissions. The question driving every design decision: what does a VP need to see in 90 seconds to know whether the organization is on track?
Cybersecurity · Fortune 500
Cybersecurity · Financial Services · KPMG

Cybersecurity Risk Dashboard — C-Suite View

$200M Risk Identified and Mitigated

Built for the C-suite of a Fortune 500 financial institution. Translates deeply technical risk data — NIST framework coverage, threat categories, vendor risk grades — into a single executive risk score with drill-down to root cause across four global regions.

Design IntentLeadership needed to answer one question in every board meeting: where are we exposed and where is our money best spent? The answer is always visible at the top level, with supporting evidence one click deeper.
Financial Analytics · P&L
Financial Services · P&L Analytics

Financial Analytics Dashboard

25% Risk Assessment Accuracy Improved

Gives leadership real-time visibility into profit margins, OPEX breakdown, revenue vs COGS trends, and EBIT performance. Integrates income statement logic with trend analytics, enabling leadership to diagnose margin movements without waiting for month-end reports.

Design IntentThe four KPI gauges at the top are the dashboard's thesis. If any are off-target, the charts below explain why. CFO and analyst served in the same view without duplication.
Expense Recovery · Transit
Finance · Expense Management · Metrolinx

Expense Recovery Tracking Dashboard

2,000+ Annual Hours Saved

Real-time visibility into expense recovery status across vendors, cost centres, and locations. Surfaces MTD and YTD recovery against budget and forecast, with variance analysis at the cost centre level and a structured observations panel that prompts analysts to narrate the story behind the numbers.

Design IntentThe "Key Observations" quadrant — What happened? Why? What are we doing? Do we need help? — forces the dashboard to generate narrative, not just display data.

Top-Tier Business School, Canada · Dean’s List & Clarosight

Jan 2025–NowToronto
Senior BI Performance Analyst
Metrolinx · Ontario Government Transit Agency

Independently leading analytics workstreams across three finance portfolios — delivering 15+ BI, automation, and process improvement solutions. Drove AI transformation by delivering a Copilot-based AI assistant that improved forecast workflow accuracy by 20% and saved 50+ hours per month. Translated assumption-based station planning into a modelled cost and revenue view using historical data from 80+ Ontario stations, reducing planning time from months to days. Replaced manual Excel and email workflows with an automated Azure Data Lake, Power BI, and Power Automate ecosystem, reducing annual reporting effort by 2,000+ hours. Secured Deputy CFO buy-in and investment approval for Copilot Studio and three AI-enabled solutions by presenting executive business cases tied to finance productivity and strategic value.

Selected Engagements

Analytics That Moved Things

01
Financial Services · Fortune 200

IT Security Cost Optimization

$8MAnnual Cost Savings

No analytical visibility into IT ticket allocation efficiency. External contractors paid double the rate of internal staff while handling half the workload. The gap was invisible without the right KPI framework.

Analytical ApproachDesigned KPIs, built what-if scenario models, exposed allocation inefficiency. Workload redirected to under-utilized internal staff. Leadership acted same day.
02
Cybersecurity · Fortune 500

Cybersecurity Risk Analytics

$200MRisk Quantified

C-suite needed a unified risk view across four global regions. Technical data existed in silos — no framework connected it to investment decisions or board-level narrative.

Analytical ApproachTranslated NIST-framework risk assessments into executive KPIs. C-suite dashboard scored risk by region and category. Capital redirected to highest-impact mitigation areas.
03
Finance · Government Transit

Enterprise Finance BI Transformation

5,000+Hours Recovered Annually

Finance teams running 70+ Excel files and 200+ monthly email submissions. Reporting fragmented, manual, and delayed with no single source of truth for senior leadership.

Analytical ApproachFull Power Platform rebuild: Power BI, Power Automate, SharePoint, Dataverse. Automated collection and validation. Self-service enabled across four finance teams.
04
Banking · CIBC

Enterprise BI Adoption & Risk Reporting

60%BI Adoption Increase

Fraud, AML, and Cybersecurity functions had siloed reporting. Senior leadership had no unified performance view. Decisions were driven by inconsistent manual reports.

Analytical Approach50+ KPIs and KRIs designed per function. Storytelling dashboards built to drive weekly leadership reviews. Self-service frameworks launched to sustain adoption at scale.
05
Transportation · KPMG

Fleet Cost Optimization

35%Transportation Cost Reduction

Rising fleet transportation costs with no measurement infrastructure. Seat utilization, vendor compliance, and no-show rates entirely untracked. Leadership had no analytical lever to pull.

Analytical ApproachKPI framework across Cost, Compliance, and Satisfaction dimensions. Predictive analysis and scenario planning surfaced actionable fleet optimization levers.
06
Consumer Goods · Retail

Revenue Recovery Through Insight Reframing

30%Sales Growth Achieved

A $20M ARR food brand's surface-level sales analysis pointed to new SKU launches as the solution. The real driver was buried one layer deeper in customer behavioral data.

Analytical Approach200+ customer surveys combined with sales trend analysis revealed the true driver. Storytelling dashboard won founder buy-in. Targeted campaign drove 30% sales growth.
